exercise_problem_title: Evaluate and compare all sequence models
exercise_requirement: Summarize train and validation curves, accuracy, Macro F1, confusion matrices, one-vs-rest ROC curves, examples, and cross-validation suitability.
research_question: Which sequence model offers the best evidence-based baseline after performance, complexity, and failure analysis?
hypothesis: The preferred model will be selected by validation Macro F1 with efficiency and stability tie-breakers, not by accuracy alone.
random_seed_policy: primary seed 42; retained comparisons repeat seeds 42, 43, and 44
safety_notes: Do not load, inspect, score, or tune against the locked test split.
